_notes: v6 extends v5: keeps the 'labels' map intact for backward compatibility; adds a 'metadata' map keyed by F-number with uncertainty_class (aleatoric / epistemic), layer (L1/L2/L3), and a why_class explanation. Three new parameters introduced in v6: F29 retired its v5 placeholder ('Absolute power cells', design only) and is reused for gasoline price trajectory; F30 deployment lag; F31 fleet growth epistemic envelope. The v5 'labels' and 'hidden_reason' maps are preserved unchanged so v5 reads of this file remain bit-equivalent to its previous behaviour.

F01.why_class: Measurement-scale variance in a measured starting value (initial f_clean). Bounded by instrument precision; does not compound over time.

F02.why_class: Measurement-scale variance in 2024 BEV registration counts. Bounded by registry precision; does not compound.

F03.why_class: EPA eGRID measurement variance on low-carbon generation emission factor. Triangular bounded; does not compound.

F04.why_class: EPA eGRID measurement variance on fossil generation emission factor. Triangular bounded; does not compound.

F05.why_class: Argonne GREET measurement variance on tank-to-wheel gasoline emission factor. Triangular bounded; does not compound.

F09.why_class: Vendor / equipment variance in sensing column. Lognormal sigma=0.30; bounded around the central spec; does not compound.

F10.why_class: Vendor / equipment variance in computing column. Lognormal sigma=0.20; bounded; does not compound.

F11.why_class: Vendor / equipment variance in communication column. Lognormal sigma=0.35; bounded; does not compound.

F15.why_class: Vendor / equipment variance for roadside sensing. Lognormal sigma=0.35; bounded; does not compound.

F16.why_class: Vendor / equipment variance for roadside computing. Lognormal sigma=0.25; bounded; does not compound.

F17.why_class: Vendor / equipment variance for roadside communication. Lognormal sigma=0.35; bounded; does not compound.

F18.why_class: Load-model variance in CAV level distribution. Dirichlet alpha=[5.0,3.33,1.67]; bounded simplex; does not compound.

F19.why_class: Load-model variance in STI level distribution. Dirichlet alpha=[5.0,3.33,1.67]; bounded simplex; does not compound.

F20.why_class: Operational overhead variance for ICECAV. Triangular(1.3, 1.6, 2.0); bounded; does not compound.

F21.why_class: Fleet-level weight on the pre-2024 cohort. Vanishes by 2036 due to retirement; bounded; does not compound.

F22.why_class: Fleet turnover variance from Oak Ridge NTL survivability curves. Triangular(8, 12, 18) yr; bounded; does not compound.

F23.why_class: Long-horizon target uncertainty. In v6 BECOMES FIXED within each policy scenario (CA-Committed/Aggressive/Delayed; OH-Status-Quo/IRA-Accelerated/Stalled). Within-scenario contribution is therefore ~zero; cross-scenario divergence is the policy choice.

F24.why_class: Long-horizon target uncertainty. In v6 BECOMES FIXED within each policy scenario. Within-scenario contribution is therefore ~zero; cross-scenario divergence reflects policy posture.

F25.why_class: Knowledge-incompleteness about future BEV adoption rates. In v6 BECOMES FIXED within each policy scenario (legislated under SB 100 / ACC II for CA, IRA-bounded for OH). Cross-scenario divergence is the legitimate object.

F26.why_class: Knowledge-incompleteness about future grid decarbonization. In v6 BECOMES FIXED within each policy scenario (e.g. SB 100 mandates CA path).

F27.why_class: Knowledge-incompleteness about hardware learning trajectory. GENUINELY EXOGENOUS to state policy (semiconductor industry progress); remains sampled within every scenario as Triangular(1.5, 2.8, 5.0) yr. Compounds because it enters the per-cohort efficiency multiplier.

F28.why_class: Knowledge-incompleteness about fleet growth form (Linear / Constant). Structural choice in v5; in v6 the structural form remains user-chosen and the epistemic envelope around it is captured by F31.

F29.why_class: v6 introduction. Epistemic uncertainty about future gasoline price. Triangular around EIA AEO 2024 reference; sigma widens with year. Affects implicit BEV adoption incentive and ICECAV cost-benefit. Genuinely exogenous (nobody controls global oil price) so remains sampled within every scenario.

F30.why_class: v6 introduction. Even at 2.8-year hardware doubling, fleet deployment takes 1-5 additional years. Analog of the Puerto Rico paper's 'organizational inefficiency' factor. Currently implicit in F27; F30 separates it.

F31.why_class: v6 introduction. Epistemic envelope around F28's structural fleet-growth choice. If autonomous ride-hailing reduces private ownership, fleet growth could go negative. Truncated normal(mu=0.002, sigma=0.002) clipped at [-0.005, +0.008].

F-OT-01.why_class: Measurement variance in component mass for one-time embodied energy phase. Bounded; does not compound.

F-OT-02.why_class: Measurement variance in material composition fraction. Bounded; does not compound.

F-OT-03.why_class: Process-engineering variance in fabrication energy intensity. Bounded; does not compound.

F-OT-04.why_class: Logistics variance in inland transport distance. Bounded; does not compound.

F-OT-05.why_class: Variance in road / rail / sea split for inland logistics. Bounded simplex; does not compound.

F-OT-06.why_class: End-of-life refurbishment ratio variance. Bounded; does not compound.
